expectations.text: Produces actual ad copy (headlines and descriptions), not a description of what to write
expectations.evidence: Delivers 8 headlines and 3 descriptions as finished copy.

expectations.text: Provides at least 5 headlines, each at or under ~30 characters
Provides at least 2 descriptions, each at or under ~90 characters
At least one headline or description leads with a reader benefit or outcome
expectations.evidence: 'Win More RFPs, Faster', 'Save [X hours] per RFP and hit every deadline' are outcome-led.

expectations.text: Includes at least one clear call to action
expectations.evidence: CTA line: 'Start a free trial / Book a demo'.

expectations.text: Uses no fabricated statistics; any specific metric is a marked placeholder
expectations.evidence: Uses [X hours]/[X]% placeholders with an explicit note to insert real numbers.
